property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3\bin;;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testExtractConstraints
testcase.system-out: 10:16:38.638 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.SQLParser -- ParseTree generated: (sqlScript (createTableStatement CREATE TABLE (tableName products) ( (columnDef (columnName id) (dataType INT) (constraint PRIMARY KEY)) , (columnDef (columnName code) (dataType VARCHAR ( 50 )) (constraint UNIQUE)) , (columnDef (columnName price) (dataType (decimalType DECIMAL ( 10 , 2 ))) (constraint CHECK ( (condition (columnName price) (comparisonOperator >) (value 0)) ))) ) ;) <EOF>) 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - START | Context: [683] 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> idINTPRIMARY KEY 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'INT' to Java type 'Long' 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: id, SQL Type: INT, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: true 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? Extracted column: id | SQL Type: INT | Primary Key: true | Default: null 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> codeVARCHAR(50)UNIQUE 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'VARCHAR' to Java type 'String' 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: code, SQL Type: VARCHAR(50), Java Type: String, Primary Key: false 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? Extracted column: code | SQL Type: VARCHAR(50) | Primary Key: false | Default: null 10:16:38.640 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> priceDECIMAL(10,2)CHECK(price>0) 10:16:38.644 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'DECIMAL' to Java type 'java.math.BigDecimal' 10:16:38.644 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: price, SQL Type: DECIMAL(10,2), Java Type: java.math.BigDecimal, Primary Key: false 10:16:38.644 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? Extracted column: price | SQL Type: DECIMAL(10,2) | Primary Key: false | Default: null 10:16:38.644 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - END | Extracted 3 columns.

testcase.name: testExtractForeignKeys
testcase.system-out: 10:16:38.650 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.SQLParser -- ParseTree generated: (sqlScript (createTableStatement CREATE TABLE (tableName orders) ( (columnDef (columnName id) (dataType INT) (constraint PRIMARY KEY)) , (columnDef (columnName customer_id) (dataType INT) (constraint REFERENCES (tableName customers) ( (columnName id) ))) ) ;) <EOF>) 10:16:38.652 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? processCreateTable() - START | Context: [683] 10:16:38.652 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- Extracted raw table name: orders 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- Extracted table name: Orders 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? BEFORE extractColumnDefinitions: columnDefinitions = [] 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - START | Context: [683] 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> idINTPRIMARY KEY 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'INT' to Java type 'Long' 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: id, SQL Type: INT, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: true 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? Extracted column: id | SQL Type: INT | Primary Key: true | Default: null 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> customer_idINTREFERENCEScustomers(id) 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Extracted Foreign Key -> Referenced Table: customers, Referenced Column: id 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'INT' to Java type 'Long' 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: customer_id, SQL Type: INT, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: false 10:16:38.662 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? Extracted column: customer_id | SQL Type: INT | Primary Key: false | Default: null 10:16:38.665 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - END | Extracted 2 columns. 10:16:38.665 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? AFTER extractColumnDefinitions: columnDefinitions = [com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition@244e619a, com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition@10acd6] | Size: 2 10:16:38.665 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? toTable() - START | Table Name: Orders 10:16:38.668 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Converting ColumnDefinition to Column object... 10:16:38.670 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Converting ColumnDefinition to Column object... 10:16:38.670 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- ? Column is Foreign Key: customer_id -> customers.id 10:16:38.670 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? toTable() - END | Converted Table: Orders with 2 columns. 10:16:38.670 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? processCreateTable() - END | Generated Table: Orders

testcase.name: testExtractTableName
testcase.system-out: 10:16:38.687 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.SQLParser -- ParseTree generated: (sqlScript (createTableStatement CREATE TABLE (tableName orders) ( (columnDef (columnName id) (dataType INT) (constraint PRIMARY KEY)) , (columnDef (columnName name) (dataType VARCHAR ( 100 ))) ) ;) <EOF>) 10:16:38.687 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- Extracted raw table name: orders 10:16:38.687 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.CreateTableDefinitionTest -- Extracted Table Name: orders

testcase.name: testExtractPrimaryKeys
testcase.system-out: 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.SQLParser -- ParseTree generated: (sqlScript (createTableStatement CREATE TABLE (tableName employees) ( (columnDef (columnName id) (dataType INT) (constraint PRIMARY KEY)) , (columnDef (columnName email) (dataType VARCHAR ( 100 ))) , (columnDef (columnName name) (dataType VARCHAR ( 50 ))) ) ;) <EOF>) 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - START | Context: [683] 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> idINTPRIMARY KEY 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'INT' to Java type 'Long' 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: id, SQL Type: INT, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: true 10:16:38.693 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ? testcase.name: testExtractColumns
testcase.system-out: 10:16:38.700 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.SQLParser -- ParseTree generated: (sqlScript (createTableStatement CREATE TABLE (tableName customers) ( (columnDef (columnName id) (dataType SERIAL)) , (columnDef (columnName name) (dataType VARCHAR ( 255 ))) , (columnDef (columnName age) (dataType INT) (constraint NOT NULL)) ) ;) <EOF>) 10:16:38.700 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?? extractColumnDefinitions() - START | Context: [683] 10:16:38.702 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsing Column Definition -> idSERIAL 10:16:38.702 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.util.TypeMapper -- Mapping SQL type 'SERIAL' to Java type 'Long' 10:16:38.702 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.ColumnDefinition -- Parsed Column -> Name: id, SQL Type: SERIAL, Java Type: Long, Primary Key: false 10:16:38.702 [main] INFO com.sqldomaingen.parser.CreateTableDefinition -- ?
